prompt: A dark ultra-detailed anime cyber-gothic portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="female elf warrior"} in a three-quarter side profile, framed from upper thighs to head, standing in a ruined futuristic industrial city. She has a short blunt bob in {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"}, pale skin, long sharp elf ears, and a calm cold expression with one visible glowing {argument name="eye color" default="crimson red"} eye. Her hair is windswept across her face, and she wears a black star-shaped metallic hair ornament near one temple. Outfit is a sleek black biomechanical armored dress with glossy obsidian surfaces, spiked and layered plates, torn lace-like textures around the shoulders and chest, and intricate demonic exoskeleton detailing. One arm is heavily armored into a massive organic-mechanical gauntlet. She holds or merges with an enormous jagged living sword crossing diagonally from the lower left foreground toward her torso; the blade is black metal with glowing veins, embedded red cores, and violent molten energy bursting through it like liquid fire. Red energy ribbons, sparks, smoke, and ember-like particles swirl around her body and weapon. The background is a vertical dystopian megastructure filled with black steel towers, cables, hanging chains, fragments of red holographic code, occult-tech insignias, and faint industrial symbols, all mostly swallowed by shadow. Use a black and deep crimson palette with extreme contrast, glossy highlights, sharp rim light, dramatic backglow behind the head, dense detail, chaotic painterly effects, and a grim apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should feel like premium dark fantasy key art, highly polished, cinematic, intimidating, elegant, and explosive.
translatedPrompt: 一幅暗黑超细节动漫赛博哥特风格肖像，主角为 {argument name="character type" default="女性精灵战士"}，采用四分之三侧面视角，构图范围从大腿上方至头部，背景为废弃的未来工业城市。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色"} 的短款齐耳波波头，皮肤苍白，长而尖的精灵耳，表情冷静冷峻，露出一只发光的 {argument name="eye color" default="深红色"} 眼睛。发丝随风拂过脸庞，太阳穴附近佩戴着黑色的星形金属发饰。身着一套光滑的黑色生物机械装甲裙，表面呈现黑曜石般的光泽，带有尖刺和分层板甲，肩部和胸部饰有撕裂的蕾丝质感，并点缀着复杂的恶魔外骨骼细节。一只手臂被重型装甲包裹，形成巨大的有机机械护手。她手持或融合了一把巨大的锯齿状活体长剑，剑身从左下角前景斜向穿过至她的躯干；剑身由黑色金属打造，布满发光的脉络和嵌入的红色核心，狂暴的熔岩能量如液态火焰般喷涌而出。红色的能量丝带、火花、烟雾和余烬般的颗粒围绕着她的身体和武器盘旋。背景是一座垂直的敌托邦巨型建筑，充斥着黑色钢塔、电缆、悬挂的锁链、红色全息代码碎片、神秘科技徽章以及模糊的工业符号，大部分被阴影吞没。采用黑色与深红色的调色板，具有极高的对比度、光泽高光、锐利的轮廓光、头部后方强烈的背光效果、密集的细节、混乱的绘画感以及冷酷的末日氛围。构图呈现出顶级暗黑奇幻关键艺术的质感，高度精致、电影感十足，既威严优雅又充满爆发力。

breakdown.creativeCore: 手持深红之刃的暗黑赛博精灵：此提示词可生成极具戏剧张力的高细节动漫暗黑奇幻角色海报，非常适合用于概念艺术、关键视觉图或令人惊艳的 AI 艺术展示。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
